definition: Contemplation of the feeling mind in the satipaṭṭhāna framework.
notes: Use this record for the citta branch of satipaṭṭhāna. Keep it aligned with the repository's feeling-mind policy so the branch does not collapse into generic cognition or thought-watching.

example_phrases.translation: one remains observing the feeling mind in relation to the feeling mind
example_phrases.notes: Standard satipaṭṭhāna formula aligned with the repo's citta policy.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the citta branch of satipaṭṭhāna in governed practice contexts.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not reduce this to thought-monitoring or generic mind-language unless a source-facing note explicitly justifies that shift.
